actual_title: Lambda Calculus, Functions, and Formal Computation

cards.title: Lambda Calculus
cards.governance_note: Track variables, abstraction, application, binding, substitution, and reduction explicitly.

cards.title: Beta Reduction
cards.governance_note: Preserve reduction traces and avoid capture during substitution.

cards.title: Typed Lambda Calculus
cards.governance_note: Use types to constrain valid expressions and connect programs to proofs.

cards.title: Formal Computation
cards.governance_note: Connect symbolic computation to implementation without overclaiming context.
